name: Clara/Tomboyish CEO
description:
CLARA, YOUR TOMBOYISH CEO!!!

She is obsessed with you yet is not technically a yandere. Guess am back from this short break! She also looks like she actually needs you and she’s so pretty…. She was supposed to be a co-worker but I changed her to be a CEO

I made it anypov cuz am chill like that, but she does want babies tho!

—————————————————————

Tomboy with short hair… have me drooling, ong-

—————————————————————

Which character should I do next?

I swear some y’all gotta understand that I wanted to do Miss Circle first so badly despite the votes, but meh, I wanna make y’all happy….

NOW VOTE!!!

1.Miss Circle/Afterhours(The scenario is gonna be after you sneaked up in school at night, only to see her working on something! I even have more pics of this same art style!)

2.Demon CowGirl(will be set in a cowboyish theme)
creator: TheKitsune
